rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST BLOCKED: Task: Verify that raising Inverter Margin updates the Inverter Rating and report the result.

Summary of actions performed:
- Navigated to https://hasan-992.github.io/solar-sizing-web/.
- Entered '200' into the Inverter Margin (%) field in the Assumptions & Settings card.
- Observed the System Sizing Results card update.

Verification against requirements:
1) Navigate to the homepage — completed and verified.
   - Evidence: current tab shows the Solar Load Sizing Calculator page (visible UI and elements).
2) Fill '200' into the Inverter Margin number field — completed and verified.
   - Evidence: Assumptions & Settings Inverter Margin input shows value=200 in the page DOM and screenshot.
3) Assertion: Inverter Rating increases to reflect the increased margin — completed and verified.
   - Evidence:
     - System Sizing Results shows Inverter Rating = 660 w (visible in page DOM and screenshot).
     - Total Connected Load = 330 W is visible on the page and the Inverter Rating card indicates '200% of total connected load', consistent with 330 W * 200% = 660 W.

Result: PASS — The UI updates as expected: when Inverter Margin was raised to 200%, the Inverter Rating increased to 660 W in the System Sizing Results card.

Notes: All evidence is taken directly from the visible page content and screenshot during this session. No login or external steps were required.
